---
title: atomic
description: "Detect non-atomic operations on atomic values."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect non-atomic operations on atomic values. Strider default: standard sync/atomic patterns.

## Bad

```go
counter = atomic.AddInt64(&counter, 1)
```

## Good

```go
atomic.AddInt64(&counter, 1)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only atomic`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
